sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), salary INT);
INSERT INTO employees (id, name, salary) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 70000), (2, 'Bob', 80000), (3, 'Charlie', 50000);
SELECT name, salary, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS salary_rank FROM employees;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary + 5000 WHERE name = 'Charlie';
SELECT name, salary, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY salary > 60000 ORDER BY name) AS adjusted_rank FROM employees;
